creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 203544
svn diff to upgrade to 0.55.0

gohugo has been updated to 0.55.0
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.55.0)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.54.0 to 0.55.0

Change log:
 - Virtualized Output Formats
 - Shortcodes Revised
 - New Return Keyword for Partials
 - .Page on Taxonomy nodes

Build successfully against amd64/i386 11.2-RELEASE, 11.2-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.0-STABLE, and 13.0-CURRENT.

Poudriere logs available here for a limited time:
https://logs.bnix.club/gohugo-0.55.0_2019-04-08/

portlint -AC:
looks fine.
